title: Front-end Engineer (Freelance)
description:
Monbanquet promotes artisanal catering service and tailor-made by designing personalized buffets for your

professional events. I integrated their new graphic identity on their website:

o Working with design and communication teams to provide an adequate technical solution
o Communicating with the back-end team to create a solution accordingly to the new architecture
o Integrating new views and pages following responsive specifications

Technologies: React, Gatsby, GraphQL
